features.featureTitle: Implement an Apple-style full-screen calendar overlay for the date picker in the Daily Entry screen (frontend/src/pages/DailyEntry.tsx). When the user taps the date field, open a full-screen modal overlay with a 40% transparent/frosted-glass background (backdrop with rgba or bg-opacity-40 blur effect). The modal must contain a large monthly calendar grid with: clean minimal Apple-inspired typography, muted weekday header labels (S M T W T F S), a subtle 'today' indicator, and an elegant filled-circle highlight on the selected day. Include smooth open/close CSS transition animations (fade + slide-up). Dismiss the overlay on swipe-down gesture or tap outside the calendar card. The calendar card itself should have a solid (non-transparent) surface so day labels and numbers remain fully readable against the transparent backdrop.
